resources.string: Da khpal app lapara yao icon aw num entekhab ka. Da ba staso pa home screen bandi da shakaridalo tarika badla ki.
FadCam app da FadSec Lab suite yo hissa da. Nur maloomat da paara, laandi \'Source Code ogorai\' bandi click kai.

FadCam yao ad-free, open-source video recording app da che privacy ta tarjeeh warkawi aw sta data na track kai aw na ye jama kai. Da sirf pa GitHub aw pa README ke che kam official links di, sirf alta dastiyab de.

FadCam pa mashhoor YouTube channels bandi feature shawe de, agha ke HowToMen aw Xtream Droid shamil di, aw da GrapheneOS aw 55+ nor articles ki ham feature shwe de.
Community join kae, madad, ideas share kawalo, aw mustaqbil app updates da paara

\n Dumra Zay shta:
%.2f GB / %.2f GB

Da Record wakh (andaza):
FHD: %s
HD: %s
SD: %s

Ter shawi wakh:
%02d:%02d
Paati wakh:
%s \n

string-array.name: tips_widget
string-array.item: 1/11 | Preview bandi ogad tap okai che band shi.
2/11 | Date widget bandi ogad tap okai che clock display ogorai.
3/11 | Storage widget pa realtime ki recording space update kai.
4/11 | Stats widget videos aw istemal shawe space khai.
5/11 | Video quality (HD, SD, FHD) pa settings ke badlede shi.
6/11 | Kam space de? Video quality kam kai zyat recording wakh da paara.
7/11 | Settings ki watermark add kai.
8/11 | Exact location acholo la settings ki option ogorae.
9/11 | Makhi wala camera na record kol di? Settings ki select kae.
10/11 | Da app preferences save kigi aw agha pakhpala apply kigi.
11/11 | Madad pakar de? About ki Discord link shte alta na join kae.

resources.string:
\n Videos: %d
Zay: %s \n
Watermark option intikhab kai\n(Default: Timestamp sara da FadCam)
Oke zar video save kol we, nu \'No Watermark\' intekhab kae. Watermark am add kol gware? Nu byam hes khabara nada, bs lag wakh ba der akhli!
Da location data am watermark ki shamil kae. \nGPS pehla zaruri on kol de \n(Default: Disabled)
Da Phone GPS enable kae, da latitude aw longitude data watermark ke shaamil kolo dapara.

string-array.name: easter_eggs_array
string-array.item: Oo! Dalta nashi ratlay. Recording shuru ka pehla che access darkam.
Ta yo khaas button omuntalo! kho da sam nakai lol
Zarrr sha! Sta system alutoo wala de… ya kideshi sirf recording shuru kolo sara theek shi.
Asi, ajeeba kas ye yara…
Sta da Bugatti kam rung de?
Za de dapara na ym program shwe sa che rasara ta ke lagya. Yo minute, ta ma hack ke kho na?

string-array.name: questions_array
string-array.item: DISCLAIMER
FadCam da user data jama kai zan sara?
Di app ki ishtehar am shta?
FadCam da location access wali gwari?
Da internet permission walae zarurat de?
Hes runga data pa external servers bande store kegi?
Zama videos sara sa kegi record kolo na pas?
FadCam zama data third party services ta legi?
General
Da watermarking dumra der wakh wali akhli?
Za video quality sanga badlole sham?
Za da preview video band kole sham?
Za location sanga pa watermark ki achole sham?
Zama preferences de app ki save kegi?
Za scheduled recordings kole sham?
Da app za sanga update kole sham?

string-array.name: answers_array
string-array.item: FadCam hes am ghair akhlaqi ya illegal istemal la nade. Misuse, da cha surveillance ya privacy ki da dakhal, zamung da guidelines khilaf di. Da de app authors hes qisam am misuse jawabgar na di.
Na, FadCam hes kisam user data na jama kai.
Na, FadCam bilkul ad-free dai.
Da location info watermark ke shaamil kawalo dapara.
Da automatic update checking da para.
Na, tola data sta pa device bandi store kigi.
Sta videos sta pa device ki internal app storage ke save kigi.
Na, FadCam hes data na share kai ao na jama kai, hatta crash logs hum na.
Watermark har frame ke shaamil kigi. Ogad video we nu, zyat wakh ba akhli.
Video quality settings ke badal kideshi: HD, SD, or FHD.
Preview wala zay bandi, disable kawalo dapara, long press okai.
Location settings ke enable kae, che watermark ke da location data shaamil she. Da precise longitude aw latitude data shaamil kai.
Ao, preferences aw tol settings save kegi ao pakhpala apply kigi.
Da feature ba bad ki razi, In Sha Allah.
Updates dapara, official GitHub repo check kae.

resources.string: Zaruri khabara: Da app la development ki de. Nawi features wakh sara add kegi.
Video save kolo ke fail shwa
Ya darust position nade ya video list null dai
Pa rishtiya da video delete kol gwari?
Ta pa rishtya gware che da video(s) da safae hasti na mitao kam? 🚀💥
Di app ta da location permission zarurat dai, location data videos ke shaamil kolo la. Mehrbani oka ao permission warka warla.
Stasu pehla na latest version bandi de.
Yo nawe version (%1$s) milaoshu. Update kolo dapara, F-Droid store ya GitHub repository na download kae.
Ta tol videos delete kol gware?
Theme badal sho. Tabdili tatbiq kegi...
Da app launcher icon aw num badal ka

Khpal videos pa PIN lock sara da Records tab ke masoon ka. \nSta amniyat da para, kala che app background ta zy ya band shi, Records tab ba automatic lock kegi. Kala che bewapas razy, no ta ba byaa unlock kaway
PIN pa bryalitob sara jor sho
PIN pa bryalitob sara lere sho
Da Tab Lock faalolo lapara PIN tasdiq ka
Da Tab Lock ghair faalolo lapara PIN tasdiq ka
Da lereko lapara PIN tasdiq ka
Ke mujud wi, khas lens entekhab ka masalan Wide Angle Lens\n(Default: Asli (0))
Yawa asli shaa camera paidaa shwa

Codec entekhab ka (Default: %1$s) Yadona: da H.265 (HEVC) sara, taso kawalai shai da H.264 pa nisbatan neema bitrate warkaawi ao quality ba hum agha we. Misal: da FHD lapara, 8 Mbps warkaawi pr zay da 16 Mbps.

Bitrate da video kaifiyat aw file size control kawi. Zyat = kha kaifiyat, khaw loy files. Dera zyat ya der kam kole da recording problems ya kharab kaifiyat jor kole shi. Da toseya shwy range sta pa device aw entekhab shwi resolution bandi takia lari. Da default qimat porta sta pa osani tanzimato bandi bina de.
Khabardar: Bitrate der kam de. Da video kaifiyat kharab kegi.
Khabardar: Bitrate der zyat de. Recording nalakam kegi ya device garm kegi.
Bitrate pa toseya shwi range ke de.
Nagalai bitrate. Meharbaani wka da %1$d aw %2$d Mbps pa maniz ke yaw qimat dakhel ka.
Bitrate pa bryalitob sara save sho.
Bitrate pa default bandi reset sho.

Bitrate da video pa har second ke karowono da malumato miqdar de. Zyat bitrate matlab de kha kaifiyat khaw loy files. Der zyat ya der kam kole mishkil jor kegi. Default qimatuna pa maslaqi camera standarduno bandi bina di.
Da khpalo videogano lapara samt entekhab ka. Portrait (walaro) da social media lapara kha de; Landscape (paltano) da YouTube, presentations aw gharo lapara kha de.

Pa automatic dol recordings pa waro waro files ke taqsimawi (Default: Ghair faal). Tawsia shwy: 2 GB da twazun lapara. Da 4 GB pore options aw custom sizes shta. Da da loya recordings management ke aw da device file size limit na tadbiqi ke madad kawai.
Pa Videogano ke Mawqeiyat Shamil Ka
Pa video metadata ke GPS coordinates shamilol (geotags). \nGPS faal pakar de \n(Default: Ghair Faal)
Da mawqeiyat malumaat pa negh pa video files ke shamilegi, kole da gallery/map apps le khole shi owe warshayi che video cherta akhestale shwai de.
Ejazat werkawal sho! Os ta kole shi da mawqeiyat khasiyatuna pa tanzimato ke faal ka.
Sta videogano ta da GPS coordinates shamilolo lapara da mawqeiyat ejazat pakar de. Da dé khasiyat karawalo lapara meharbaani wka ejazat werka.
Da videogano lapara da audio sabtol faal ya ghair faal ka.\n(Default: Faal)
Da audio sabtolo lapara kom microphone karegi entekhab ka. Ke wired mic wasal na wi, automatic ba da telefon mic karol kegi.
Wired mic paidaa na sho. Da telefon mic karol kegi.
Nadurust bit rate. Da 64000 aw 384000 tar minz qimat dakhil ka.
Nadurust sampling rate. 44100 ya 48000 dakhil ka.
Da ghora kaifiyat lapara da ghag bit rate aw sampling rate tanzim ka. Default: 192000 bps, 48000 Hz, Stereo.

• Bit Rate (bps) da ghag kaifiyat aw da file size control kawi. Lwar qimatuna kha kaifiyat magar lwae files maning lari. 192000 da aksar karolo lapara yaw kha default de. • Sampling Rate (Hz) har second ke da tso zala ghag akhestelo shmair de. 48000 Hz da video lapara standard de, 44100 Hz da ghag lapara aam de.
Tawsiya shwee: 192000 bps, 48000 Hz da aksar karwonko lapara.
Da debug log file jorolo faal ka \n(Default: Ghair Faal)
Kala che faal shi, yaw debug log file ba pa Downloads/FadCam folder ke jorol kegi. Da dé pa app problems ke madad kole shi.
Pa Raatluky Sho Ke Onboarding Warshayi
Faal ka che pa raatluky karazan ke da FadCam da app pezhandana aw ejazat larshowuna wuwiny.
Pa Sho Ke Automatic Update Check
Ke faal wi, FadCam ba har kala che ta app kholé update check kawi. Da automatic update check band kolo lapara dé ghair faal ka.\n(Default: On)
Ka zakhira kawal chi videos cherta sakli.
Khoso Zai (SD Card/Nor, Da Gallery La Khwaa Katey Kegi)
Yadawana: Da khoso zai karwal videos noro app ta kesheena kedole shi (masalan, Gallery). Dakhili zakhira videos yawazi FadCam ta private sati.
Meharbaani wka da naway recording shoroo kolo na wrandy yaw lahza sabr wka
د دوام لپاره ښي خواته وښويئ
خپله خوښه د ایپ ژبه غوره کړئ.
او ستاسو لپاره جوړ شوی - نه د اعلان ورکوونکو لپاره.
تاسو کولای شئ دا وروسته په تنظیماتو کې بدل کړئ.
FadCam د ویډیو ثبتولو او ساتلو لپاره ستاسو کامرې، مایکروفون، او زېرمتون ته لاسرسي ته اړتیا لري.
د دوام لپاره تاسو باید ټولې اجازې ورکړئ.
د بیټرۍ آپټیمایزيشن غیر فعاله کړئ
تصدیق کړئ که تاسو انسان یاست
هممم... سمه ده. دا قواعد غیر قابل مذاکره دي. که تاسو نشئ منلی، مهرباني وکړئ FadCam همدا اوس له منځه یوسئ.
زه به FadCam د کوم قانون ماتولو، د چا محرمیت ته تېری کولو، یا د عجیبه کارونو لپاره نه کاروم. که چېرې زه غلطي وکړم، د پروګرام جوړوونکی مسؤل نه دی. (دا زما مسؤلیت دی).
زه لا له کارولو مخکې له FadCam سره مینه لرم. (اختیاري نه دی)
Ta darto video record kai nedi
Da FadCam lapara da liray control zur razee.

Da QR code pa mreshta sara FadCam clients jora ka da secure, mahali network control lapara: record shoro/band kawalo, preview, zoom, camera switch kawalo, aw nor dher - tol da end-to-end encryption sara.
%1$d zorani items pa khpala delete shwal.
Da delete kawalo lapara kho item neshta.
%1$d items pa daimi tawga delete shwal.
Da items pa delete kawalo ki ghalati.
Aya yaqin lari che %1$d khwakharai items pa daimi tawga delete kai? Da kar na badlolai kedai shi.
Aya yaqin lari che tol items pa daimi tawga delete kai? Da kar na badlolai kedai shi.
Kho item na day khwakharai shwai.
%1$d items da public Downloads/FadCam/ folder ta berta restore sho?
Da items pa berta restore kawalo ki ghalati. Shaied dzini files restore na shi ya gallery update na shi. Da app storage permissions check ka.

plurals.name: trash_auto_delete_info_days
plurals.item: Items pa khpala pas la %1$d wredzo delete kegi.
Items pa khpala pas la %1$d wredzo delete kegi.

plurals.name: trash_auto_delete_info_hours
plurals.item: Items pa khpala pas la %1$d saata delete kegi.
Items pa khpala pas la %1$d saato delete kegi.

resources.string: Pa trash ki items heekla pa khpala delete na kegi, videos pa lasa delete ka.
Da Khpala Delete Kawalo Waht Tanzeem Ka
Da recording notification zaher badal kai\n(Default: FadCam)
Pa notification ke da bandawalo button pat kai\n(Default: Disabled)

string-array.name: notification_appearance_options
string-array.item: FadCam (default)
Da system update
Download kawol
Sync kawol
Backup
Custom

resources.string: Da recording notification zaher badal ka
Da notification zaher tsanga wi entekhab ka
Da Band Kawalo Button Pat Ka
Da notification na da band kawalo button lari ka
Da recording notification tsanga zaher kegi tanzim ka
Da YouTube application o na mundal sho
Da Google Drive application o na mundal sho
Repair kigi… Da lag seconds wakhli shay.
Video repair sho! Da save sho da num sara: %1$s
Repair fail sho. Tafseeli maloomat da logs ki ogora.
FIXED_ file pehla na mojood dai.
Repair sirf da internal ya accessible files la support dai.
SAF video copy kolo ke fail sho repair da para.
Repaired file SAF folder ta likh nashu. Da app storage ki save sho.
Video repair sho! Save sho da num sara: %1$s.
Repaired file da app storage na export ya share kawalai shay.
For full changelog, head to the Home tab and open the hamburger menu, then select "What's New".
Kala che faal wi, auto-exposure pa osany roshnaai bandi saati de che camera ba recording wakht ke exposure bya adjust na kawi. Pa Exposure tile sara manual exposure adjustments ka.
Camera pa khpala focus continuously adjust kawi. Manual focus dapara preview bandi tap ka.
Focus band de. Manual focus kolo dapara preview bandi tap ka.
Default option is Continuous Auto Focus.
Da Records tab dapara mahfuziat jor ka: 4-digit PIN, password, ya fingerprint sara. Kala che app pasmanzar ta shi, ba khpala lock shi.
Tab Lock chalu de. Kala che app na wrusta razy, Records tab kholo dapara PIN ba darkar wi.
Tab Lock PIN tanzim sho. Kala che app ta wapas razy PIN darkar walo dapara de toggle on ka.
Intikhab Ka how to display the Islamic date
Da progress bar bandi da ghag visualization woyai
Kala che faal wi, audio ba jari wi hatta che app na watan shi ya screen band kae.
Intikhab Ka how long playback should continue in background before automatically stopping. Intikhab Ka Off to disable.
Based on real-world test: 8 hours continuous streaming with 61% battery drain on a 5000mAh device. Update sta / khpal device capacity below for personalized estimates.
Camera da bel app istemal kegi
Bela app camera istemal kawi. Kala che camera mojood shi, recording ba khpala bya shuru shi.
Recording lag waqfa shu (camera in use)
Camera sara bya wasal kolo kushish kigi...
Camera sara bya wasal na shwa, tiyar frames sara jari de
Camera bya wasal sho, recording bya shuru shi
Da num ba sta FadSec Cloud dashboard ke zaher shi
Unlink ka che sta account na jude shi. Ta ba bela num sara bya link kol shaye.
Device link kolo ke fail sho. Mehrbani oka bya kushish ka.
Device pa bryalitob sara link sho!
Mehrbani oka login ka che khpal device link kae
Aya yaqin lari che ta da device unlink kol gware?

📡 Live streaming via HLS requires H.264 codec.
H.265 is not compatible with browser players.
Would you like to switch to H.264 and start recording?
H.265 Codec Not Supported for Live Streaming
✓ Codec switched to H.264. Starting recording...
Intikhab ka che player controls pa tso seconds zaher pati wi auto-hiding na pesh. Controls zaher sawalo dapara Off tanzim ka.
Lere Ka the log file from storage
Ogora in a browser or HTML viewer

Da debug log file woyai (FADCAM_debug.html). Debug logging faal kol performance bandi asar achi shi - faal ya kri kala che ta da bug sara makh wi aw log share kol gware. Search box istemal ka che filter kae.
Preview, search, share or delete FADCAM_debug.html
Aya yaqin lari che ta %1$s delete kol gware?
%1$d video(s) deleted. Fail Sho to delete %2$d.
Yo saada roznama report woyai da jumla events aw event qismuna, che ta osani tor har video khola na activity review kol shaye.
Aala safety labeling ikhtiari aw sakht de. Da pat sawa ka magar che ta khas tor high-sensitivity security labels gware.
Discord alerts ba mustaqbil update ki zayda shi.
Think of da as sta / khpal smart evidence sensor. When enabled, FadCam keeps a timeline of detected activity so you can jump to important moments later.
Kala che faal wi, detections forensic database ke real time ki proof frames sara likhel kegi. Da pat sawa ka che ta sirf live preview labels gware bela storage growth.
Da muntashira mawqeyo na yo movement map jor kai. Zeati roghan zono da camera view pa agha hissa ke tayar activity woyai.

Digital Forensics dwa hissa lari: live preview overlay aw saved evidence. Che ta sirf live visual AI labels gware, nu Evidence Collection band sawa ka. Che ta forensic history pakar de, nu Evidence Collection faal ka aw intikhab ka che store kawalai gware.
Motion Lab os waqt ghair faal de. Forensics recording da Motion Lab analysis bandi madakur de. Pehla Motion Lab faal ka che forensic events capture kae.
Show AI Overlay in Live Preview
Kala che mojood wi, da live preview ke saada labels draw kai che ta wuwiny che AI real time ke sa noticing kai. Clean preview dapara band ka.
Events record kai kala che person motion sessions ke detect shi. Da kor monitoring aw entry-point logs dapara behtar option.
Pet tagging dapara yao khas model darkar de aw enham tarseedi kegi. Faal ya kri che ta early support test kai.
Simulated overlay preview che users labels, confidence, aw evidence framing pohe shi.
Evidence timeline, identity relink, and smart insights
Da mukammal amniyat shahadat dapara behtar: khalk ao non-person objects.
Store only non-person detections (vehicles, pets, objects).
Sirf person detections store ka che storage kam kai aw pa human activity focus ka.
Intikhab ka che evidence ke sabt shi. Da database rows aw proof frames bandi asar achi kai.
Vehicle tagging dapara yao khas model darkar de aw enham tarseedi kegi. Ta da pat sawa kol shaye hatta che model support na razy.
Da PiP overlay visual appearance khoso ka, border, koshuna, aw spacing shamil de.
Dawa cameras detect shwal, kho concurrent support tasdiq na shwi. Tafseelaat dapara tap ka.
Dual camera pa mukammal tor da sta device lado confirmed aw support kai.
Dual camera is not supported on da device.
Devices with Qualcomm Snapdragon 855 or newer, Google Tensor, Samsung Exynos 990 or newer, aw MediaTek Dimensity 1000 or newer typically concurrent camera access support kai.
✓ Sta device dual camera recording support kai.
⚠ Your device has both cameras, kho concurrent support tasdiq na shwi. Shaied kar kawi ya na kawi.

Dual camera recording requires sta / khpal device to operate both front and back cameras simultaneously. This is a hardware capability agha depends on sta / khpal device\'s processor and camera hardware. Most flagship phones from 2020 onwards support da feature. Mid-range and older devices typically do not.\n\nThis is NOT a bug — it\'s a hardware limitation of sta / khpal device.
✗ Sta device dual camera recording support nadi kai.
Dual camera wali support nadi kai?
Dual camera recording wakht ke PiP overlay dapara position, size aw primary camera tanzim ka.
Intikhab ka che kom kosh ke secondary camera (PiP) overlay kigdi shi.
Control kai che PiP overlay da full output width pa nisbat der loy de.
Da agha shan de che PiP mode pa landscape mode ke tsanga zaher shi masalan.
Intikhab ka che koma camera full frame pur kai. Bela camera ba PiP overlay ke zaher shi.
Modern rayaz dapara PiP overlay ke gole koshuna tatbiq ka.
Tanzim Ka PiP layout and appearance
PiP overlay chardey yao patli border woyai che visually da pasmanzar na separation ka.
Dual camera not supported on da device
Tanzim na shwi — cloud streaming faalolo dapara tanzim ka
Sta FadSec ID password na stream encryption key hasil kegi. Da ba da password sara match kawalai shi che ta FadCam dashboard ke streams ogorlo dapara istemal kai.
Enter sta / khpal FadSec ID password
Zaruri ejazato mojood nadi. Mehrbani oka agha werka che jari shi.
Peshdasti rasai: Public release na pesh enha version hasil ka
Da umar updates: Har wakht nawi features, behtari, aw bug fixes akhesta ka
Instant support: Direct help through tickets via Discord
Pro+ aw Lab features zur razee custom icon uploads, custom app names, aw FadDrive cloud sync sara.
🎉 Free until December 23, 2025! Pas na, sirf $15 ki lifetime access hasil ka.
December 23, 2025 na pas, $15 ki Lifetime Access hasil ka — yo wari payment, hamesha updates.

FadCam ba hamesha free pati de, ishtehar na aw tracking na. Za pura project pa khpala handel kawam. Pro ta upgrade kol (os waqt free) development ke madad kai. Da project da mali mard dapara manana :)
Extract the audio track from the current video
Ghag extracted and added to timeline
No audio track found in da video
Intikhab Ka any video from sta / khpal device
Band Ka & Sabt Ka Ka Ka
Sta project ba khpala save shi. Ta ba da naray projects na har waqt bya kholay shi.
Sabt Ka Ka Ka project and return
Delete Ka Ka %1$d project(s)? This cannot be undone.
Tap "New Project" to pick a video and begin editing
Export ka in progress. Go back to editor?
Sta video Records Tab ki save shwa de.
%1$s • %2$d clip(s)%3$s Export runs as a background service — you can close the app and it will keep exporting.
Export ka will continue in background
Crash-safe recordings khpala seekable standard MP4 ke badal kai che smooth playback everywhere
Export ka in MP4 with hardware-accelerated encoding
Instant playback of sta / khpal trimmed clips
Tol editing mahali tor kegi — na uploads, na cloud
Khpal videos exact frame ta cut ka che ta gware

FadCam records in a crash-safe format called fragmented MP4 (fMP4). Unlike a standard MP4 which has one finalized container, fMP4 writes video in small independent chunks. This means sta / khpal footage stays intact even if the app crashes or recording stops suddenly.

However, external video players, gallery apps, and file managers will not be able to seek, scrub, or display the correct duration of these files. This is not a bug — it is a deliberate design trade-off for reliability.

If you plan to store sta / khpal videos outside FadCam — on Google Drive, a computer, or any other location — you must convert them first. Otherwise the files will be unusable for normal playback.

To convert: simply open the video here in Faditor Mini and tap Export ka. The converted standard MP4 will appear in sta / khpal Records tab, ready to save to sta / khpal gallery or share anywhere. The process is instant and lossless — no re-encoding or quality loss.

Exported videos are saved to sta / khpal active storage location (the same one configured in Tanzimaat) with the prefix \"Faditor_\" followed by a timestamp. They appear in the Records tab alongside sta / khpal original recordings.

Intikhab Ka any video from sta / khpal device or sta / khpal FadCam recordings. Trim it frame-by-frame using the timeline, then export. All processing happens locally on sta / khpal device — nothing is uploaded.\n\nYour editing progress is auto-saved every few seconds and whenever you leave the editor, so no work is lost if the app closes unexpectedly.

All sta / khpal editing sessions are shown for quick access. Each project is stored as a small JSON file on sta / khpal device containing the video URI, trim points, and timestamps — no copies of sta / khpal videos are made. Projects are auto-saved every few seconds, so sta / khpal progress is never lost.\n\nYou can delete projects you no longer need using the multi-select checklist icon. Deleting a project only removes the editing session data; sta / khpal original video files remain untouched.
Har shay che ta da built-in editor dapara poho lari gware

When you load an fMP4 video for editing, Faditor detects if the file needs "remuxing" — a fast conversion agha adds seeking markers without re-encoding. Remuxed files are cached on sta / khpal device so they can be reused if you edit the same video again, saving time and processing.

You can see the cache size for each project listed next to its modified date. If sta / khpal device storage is running low, you can delete unused projects to clear their cached remuxed files.

These temporary cache files are automatically cleaned up when you delete a project from da tab.
Khpal videos precision sara trim aw export ka
No recordings found yet. Recording shuru ka with FadCam to see sta / khpal videos here.
FadCam sara record shwi videos sta chalu storage location na
Intikhab Ka a video from sta / khpal gallery or pick one from sta / khpal FadCam recordings
Cannot split here — too close to edge
FadRec sta mic ta rasai na lari. Ta record muted kol shaye — hes audio ba save na shi.
Live screen preview enham FadRec ke wired na shwi
Floating quick menu da noro appo pa sar overlay ke zaher kai, cherta na recording controls ta osani rasai warkawi. Da feature faalolo dapara, "Display over other apps" ejazat darkar de.
Intikhab Ka clip color for gallery cards.
Intikhab shwi evidence ba Nezdai Waht ta move shi aw Recently Deleted na berta restore kol shaye.
Delete Ka Ka %1$d selected evidence item(s)?
No events found for the selected filters.
Filter detections and jump to exact moments.
Source video links traceability dapara shamil di. Che media original location na move ya delete shi, playback links fail shi shi aw snapshots ba primary evidence ke pati shi.
Da save shwi forensic evidence na JSON metadata + snapshots package jor kai.
Da osany filter da para kho evidence snapshots nadi.
Sta recordings na AI-detected frames ba dalta zaher shi
Video missing: snapshot-only evidence is available.
Intikhab ka che pa gallery ke kom columns woyai.
Roghan dage da tayar harkat meaning lari. Dim dage da kam activity meaning lari.

Evidence Gallery pa chalu recording sessions ke akhestali shwi snapshots store kai.
Snapshots khpali evidence files di aw wuwiny keda shi hatta che source video move ya delete shi.
Da video-linked items dapara, photo viewer ke evidence details istemal ka che source footage ta wruzi kala che mojood wi.
Evidence dalta zaher kai os kala che recording wakht ke snapshots akhestali shi.
Source video actions sirf os wakht mojood di kala che original video link mojood wi.
Che video badla ya lere shi, snapshots ba khpali evidence ke mojood pati shi.
Snapshots aw metadata archive ke bundle kolo dapara Export Center istemal ka.
Original media is unavailable. Using saved evidence only.
Intikhab Ka tape design for evidence index tags.
Ghair Faal Ka front video flip
Recording shuru ka first to use fullscreen preview
Quality/size balance dapara bitrate aw sampling rate khoso ka.
Tawsia shwi: 192000 bps da high-quality stereo dapara. Kam qimato file size kam kai kho clarity kamulai shi. Range 64000-384000 bps.
Intikhab Ka which connected microphone/input to use.
Video dapara 48000 Hz (recommended) ya general audio compatibility dapara 44100 Hz intikhab ka.
GPS coordinates pa video metadata ke shamil kai (geotag).
Intikhab ka che location watermark ke tsanga zaher kai: exact coordinates, ya da reverse geocoding pa mreshta full address (zoom=18, building-level precision).
Watermark landi taqriban coordinates zaheer kawi.
Pa recording wakht ke live location text overlay zaher kawi.
Overlay ke sta device location zyadawalo badal ka. Da location ejazat darkar de.
Experimental filter to reduce background noise.
Toggle capturing microphone audio in videos.
Intikhab Ka a theme. Applies instantly.

Custom text line zaat ka che timestamp aw location landi (ke faal wi) sta watermark ki zaher shi.
Misaluna: ABC-1234 (dashcam), Camera #3, Conference Hall A
Overlay content intikhab ka: timestamp + brand, sirf timestamp, ya hes na.
Da agha shan de che watermark sta recorded video pa pas-kuch ki zaher shi. Fun fact: 10/Jul/2024 04:47 PM wakht ke FadCam v1.0 first shipped.
Da Kor palette na yao clock card rang intikhab ka.
Da clock card istemal shwi accent/background rang intikhab ka
Change the clock display, color, and hour format.
Show time with the English date line
Da clock card istemal shwi layout intikhab ka.
Show time with English and Islamic calendar lines
Intikhab ka che kom date aw wakh lines da clock card ke zaher shi
Show only the main time line
Show time with AM and PM
24-hour format ke AM aw PM bela wakh woyai
Da Kor clock istemal shwi hour format intikhab ka.
Intikhab ka che clock 12-hour ya 24-hour wakh woyai
Anchor the elapsed timer to the start
Intikhab Ka the alignment for the elapsed timer.
Intikhab ka che elapsed content pa card ke tsanga positioned shi
Elapsed timer dapara yao qawi tiyar card background warka che qawi container de
Da elapsed timer card istemal shwi background treatment intikhab ka.
Intikhab ka che elapsed timer pa tiyar, spin, ya transparent card bandi shi
Elapsed timer card visually halka aw khol sawa ka
Timer dapara yao saaf spin card background tiyar text sara istemal ka
Elapsed timer display, alignment, size, font, accent flag, aw background khoso ka.
Elapsed wakh 5h 16m 23s compact inline units sara woyai
Elapsed wakh 00:00 ya 01:05:23 inline labels bela woyai
Intikhab ka che elapsed timer pa card ke tsanga zaher kai.
Compact inline elapsed time aw digital clock format ka maniz ke badal ka
Intikhab ka che FadSec Lab flag accent da elapsed timer shata zaher shi ke na.
Elapsed timer area flag accent bela saaf sawa ka
Da timer shata da FadSec Lab flag accent woyai ya pat ka
Rayaz the branded flag accent behind the timer
Doto font istemal kai da zeati khas digital timer look dapara
Da elapsed timer numbers istemal shwi font intikhab ka.
Android monospace font istemal kai da clearer fixed-width digits dapara
Da elapsed timer value istemal shwi font intikhab ka
Da timer dapara da app default Ubuntu font istemal kai
Intikhab ka che elapsed timer tsanga prominent zaher shi.
Largest timer size for maximum emphasis
Balanced default size for the elapsed timer
Switch between compact and larger elapsed timer presets
Most compact timer size for a tighter card
Storage indicator style aw total-storage visibility khoso ka.
Mojood jaai yao warak ufqi pill bar ke woyai
Da mojood zakhira woyalo dapara style intikhab ka.
Intikhab ka che mojood zakhira pa icon slot ke tsanga visualize shi
Show available space as a compact circular ring
Mojood jaai yao compact vertical fill bar ke woyai
Intikhab ka che jumla zakhira qimat da mojood jaai krang woyai shi ke na.
Keep only the available-space value visible
Show or hide the slash and total-capacity value
Rayaz the slash and total-capacity value inline
Da time-left row dapara accent rang intikhab ka. Sur default de.
No intelligence data available.\nAsset monitoring is active.
Tap any bar for hourly breakdown
Sta camera view 9 zones ke taksim shwi. Zeati roghan = pa agha hissa ke zeati activity detect shwi.
Kala che faal wi, screen ba video chalao wakht ke na wridegi.
Tafseel will be set in code.
Made with at FadSec Lab in
Da mawqeiyat ejazat mana shwi. Location features ba ghair faal shi.
Watermark ke location data update kolo frekvensi. Zeati wakhuna kam battery istemal kai.
Measure angles and slopes using gyroscope
This feature will be available in the future
Digital compass with bearing display and navigation features
Sabt Ka Ka Ka sta / khpal parking spot and navigate back with GPS arrow
Step counter using built-in step sensor
QR codes text, URLs, aw contacts na jor ka
Scan QR codes and barcodes instantly
Ogora accelerometer, gyroscope, and sensor data
Ambient noise level detector in decibels (dB)
Real-time car speedometer with GPS speed tracking
Control sta / khpal device\'s LED flashlight
Use full screen brightness as a light source

Da Kor screen shortcuts da har Mini App ta osani rasai dapara FadCam pehla khola na.
Intent-based automation support (Tasker, MacroDroid, etc.) da Mini Apps programmatically trigger kolo dapara — QR scanning, torch, aw nor automated workflows ke istemal ka.

AI har second ke scene tso wari check kai. Zeati checks zarz react kai, kho zeati battery aw phone garm kawalai shi. Da EfficientDet multi-class detection dapara, 6 fps daily use dapara sawa ka (5-8 reliable zone de).
Motion pa khabar ke Auto Torch
Flashlight ON kai kala che recording da motion na shuru shi, aw OFF kai kala che recording waqfa kai. Da tiyar kayo dapara mufeed de.

Recording shuru kolo na pesh yao lag tasdiq dair. Da agha shan de che yao lag lamza intizar kae che movement asli de. Kam qimat zarz shuru kai, zeati qimat false starts na kai. 220 ms aksar kayo dapara sawa ka.
Area %1$.3f, Strong %2$.3f, Mean %3$.3f, BG %4$.3f, Max %5$.3f, Global %6$s
No motion snapshot is available yet.
Pas ki controls khoso ya kri che ta khas rawai darkar wi. Da aksar setups dapara, defaults enha barkari aw mohtam intikhab de.

This is FadCam's Auto Record on Motion feature.

How it works in simple words:
- Your camera stays active and analyzes frames on-device in real time.
- The on-device machine learning model and motion logic look for movement.
- When valid motion is detected, recording starts/resumes.
- Recording keeps going while motion continues.
- After motion stops, Post-roll keeps recording for sta / khpal selected extra seconds.
- Then recording pauses and waits for the next motion event.

When recording is paused, the app is still analyzing frames in memory, but it is not writing new video data until motion is detected again.

How to use (most users):
- Keep all options at default values.
- Turn ON Motion Sensor on da screen.
- Go to Kor tab and start recording normally.
- Motion-based auto record will run automatically.

Easy test from far distance:
- Turn ON Auto Torch on da screen.
- Recording shuru ka from Kor tab.
- Place the phone tilted on a table or shelf facing the room.
- Leave the room, then enter and walk in.
- Torch turning ON helps you instantly notice from far away agha recording started.
- Recording will continue for sta / khpal selected Post-roll duration after motion stops.

Tip: This feature runs continuously, so very high advanced values can increase heat and can reduce device health over time. For long sessions, keep defaults unless you have a specific reason.
Movement band sho na pas recording der wakh jari pati shi. Misal: che chok kor na watan shi, da recording jari sawi che akhar kat na shi. 10 seconds aksar kayo dapara sawa ka.
Trigger na pesh tso seconds shamil kolo kushish kigi. Misal: che chok yak nagha zaher shi, pre-roll da madad kai che saat da dakhel kolo pesh shamil kae. 2 seconds aksar kayo dapara sawa ka.
Smart event recording for CCTV-style use
Da agha shan de che yao motion "hearing" knob. Zeati qimat pa lag movement bandi zaher kai (da lass khwakh da kenar shan). Kam qimat lag movement ignore kai. 80 aksar kayo dapara sawa ka.
Kala che movement detect shi, da aam CCTV motion camera shan shuru kai.
Intikhab ka che kom shay recording shuru kawi. Che ta yaqin nadi, Any Motion sawa ka.
Sirf kala shuru kai che movement da person shan lari. Da fan/shadows na false alerts kam kolo ke madad kai.
Kala che faal wi, videos ba muted shan default tor chalu shi. Ta da dalta ya Video Player screen na badal kol shaye.
When enabled, videos will play muted by default.
Sta device dual camera recording support nadi kai.

When enabled, FadCam writes a debug log HTML file (FADCAM_debug.html) into the public Downloads/FadCam/ folder. Share Ka da file when reporting issues. Turn off to stop future writes.\nNote: Debug logging may add performance overhead during recording — keep it off unless you are troubleshooting.
Intikhab Ka zoom ratio\n(Default: %1$.1fx - no zoom)
Sarlaik aw tafseel landi dakhil ka. Tabdilat khpala save kegi.
Preset style intikhab ka ya Custom intikhab ka che khpal sarlaik aw tafseel dakhil kae.
Kala che recording rawan wi, da agha shan zaher kegi. Intikhab Ka a style or create a custom title & description. The Da bandawalo button zaher reflects sta / khpal setting.
Yo numra dakhil ka aw save kolo dapara OK dab ka.
Sa day — OK dab ka to save.
Za da Privacy Policy sara mutafiq yam
Morse code pattern for advanced signaling
SOS Morse code pattern: 3 lag + 3 loong + 3 lag flashes
Continuous steady light for normal flashlight use
Rapid on-off flashing pattern for emergency signaling
Playback suraat adjust ka ya press-and-hold dapara Quick Speed tanzim ka. Ta da tanzimaat dalta ya Video Player screen na badal kol shaye.
Sirf osany playback bandi asar achi kai. Mustaqbil videos dapara default badalolo dapara Settings istemal ka.
Change playback speed for da video

Fragmented MP4 Format

FadCam uses a fragmented MP4 format for recordings. This means videos are saved in small segments instead of one complete file. The benefit is that if something goes wrong during recording, you only lose the last few seconds instead of the entire video.

If the last few seconds of your video appear frozen or stale, don\'t worry — it\'s not a bug! When you stop recording, the current fragment may still complete its cycle (~3 seconds), which can leave a brief stale frame at the end.

Player Limitations

The built-in video player has some Android system limitations. You may notice the progress bar or waveform appearing slightly snappy — this is normal behavior and not a bug.

For the smoothest playback experience, you can use an external player like VLC. That said, the integrated player works well for everyday use!
Sabt Ka Ka Ka all settings to JSON
Dakhil kari shay DELETE sara yaw na shwa
DELETE (tol capital) tayp ka che reset tasdiq kae
Preview-only works on front/back cameras only
Hold to wake up the camera
FadShot aw Fullscreen icons woyai hatta kala che recording idle wi.
Pehla Security Settings ke Privacy Black Screen faal ka

Intikhab ka che kom gestures Privacy Black Mode na watan kolo dapara istemal shi.
Yadona: La na yao exit method faal pati shi che bended na shi!
At least one exit method must remain enabled.

If sta / khpal device kills the app in the background, you can use da feature to keep the app running in the foreground.

A black screen overlay appears, making it look like the screen is off while recording continues.

Tap the FadCam icon in the top header of the Kor tab to activate it.
Shuru kolo dapara nawai project jor ka
Give sta / khpal project a memorable name and description to organize sta / khpal recordings
Scanned codes are saved to Records tab automatically
Quick Speed sirf os wakht istemal kai kala ta playback wakht ke dab aw ogad kai.
Recording is already in progress or paused.
Da batch action ba bela ratlole shi.
Run background automations without opening the Faditor tab.
Da bahrani players dapara fragmented MP4 seekable standard MP4 ke badal kai.
Pehla video kho sho. %1$d intikhab shwal; multi-edit queue ba bela razy.
Combines selected clips into one video in background.
%1$d batch item(s) pasmanzar ki queue shwal.
Da Records batch save aw Faditor automation tasks dapara progress aw natija.
Asli files sawi; copies %1$s ta save kai.
Intikhab Ka one folder for all selected videos in da run.
Intikhab shwi videos bela folder ta copy, move, ya export ka.
Intikhab shwi videos %1$s ta move kai aw asli files save shwo na pas lere kai.
%1$d save task(s) queue ki zaat shwal.
Pa osany filter ke tol videos intikhab ka ya saaf ka.
Pehla yao ya thousand videos intikhab ka.
Could not delete one of the selected items.
Progress and results for background deletion in Records.
All Faditor outputs and related files.
Da bahrani players dapara fragmented MP4 standard seekable MP4 ke badal sho.
Merged multiple clips into one output video.
Intikhab ka che pa gallery ke kom columns woyai.
Show a minimal list without thumbnails
Copied, but couldn\'t remove original file.
Sabt Ka Ka Ka finished with issues
Sabt Ka Ka Ka finished with issues
Intikhab ka che recordings pa fehrist ke tsanga tartib shi.
Require password to access remote web interface
Change sta / khpal remote access password
Da layer dapara nawai num olekai
Da safha dapara nawai num olekai
Berta Restore Ka to original SAF location
Intikhab Ka Berta Restore Ka Mawqeiyat
Fail Sho to restore some items
SAF ejazat mojood nadi. Mehrbani oka intikhab shwi folder ta rasai werka.
Da recordings khoso zai ke save kolo dapara, FadCam ta intikhab shwi folder ta rasai dapara ejazat pakar de. Kala che prompt kai, mehrbani oka ejazat werka.
VBR da content complexity bandi fit kai. CBR yao fixed target bitrate istemal kai.
Faal Ka "FadRec Screenshot" in Accessibility to use da shortcut without recording prompt.
Da FadRec shortcut dapara screenshot akhesti kai aw FadCam/FadShot ki save kai.
Screenshot captured by system. Saved in system screenshots.
Large seek values may skip too far
Enter a value between 1 and 300 seconds
Intikhab ka che rewind/forward buttons aw double-tap tso seconds seek kai.
Da app preview pa recent apps ke pat kai aw pa app ke screenshots block kai. Da hassas content da app switcher ke akhestelo ya zaher kolo na sari kai.
Block Screenshots & Pat Ka in Recents
Intikhab Ka the avatar eye glow color
Intikhab Ka the header logo style
Da shortcut yao shata camera tasweer akhesti kai aw FadCam/FadShot location ta save kai.
Da shortcut yao makhki camera tasweer akhesti kai aw FadCam/FadShot location ta save kai.
Da shortcut yao screenshot akhesti kai aw FadCam/FadShot location ta save kai (Settings > Privacy > Accessibility na Accessibility permission faal ka).
This shortcut starts recording with the back camera.
Da shortcut os waqt intikhab shwi camera mode sara recording shuru kai.
This shortcut starts dual camera recording (PiP).
This shortcut starts recording with the front camera.
This shortcut stops the current recording.
Intikhab Ka an icon for da shortcut. You can choose from the app\'s icon set or select an image from sta / khpal gallery.
Da de shortcut dapara custom num aw icon tanzim ka.
Pasa na shortcuts zaat ka. Agha da automation apps (masalan MacroDroid) sara ham kar kai che actions trigger kai da volume buttons mapping shan.
Tip: Leave empty to use the default name.
Your launcher will prompt for placement.
Intikhab ka che nawi recordings cherta save shi. Dakhili zakhira videos app ta private sawi; custom folder (SD card ya shared storage) no apps (masalan Gallery) ta zaher kai.
Nasihat: Privacy/speed dapara Dakhili istemal ka. Asan rasai aw sharing dapara Custom istemal ka.
Stream and save recording to storage
Idle - Recording shuru ka to stream
2. HLS Stream URL Server Endpoints na copy ka
3. VLC ya kom ham HLS player pa same WiFi ke khola
4. Live ogorlo dapara URL media player ke paste ka
Same WiFi network required for streaming

⚠️ Android 14+: System restriction prevents recording when screen is off. Workarounds: (1) Faal Ka "Black Screen Mode" in Tanzimaat → Amniyat, or (2) Ghair Faal Ka screen lock (no PIN/password/fingerprint). Both allow seamless remote recording

⚠️ Sirf WiFi: Cellular networks nari wasaluna block kai. Da har network na seamless streaming dapara (WiFi, LTE, cherta), FadCam Pro+ ta upgrade ka. Da har network na private link sara stream ka — no port forwarding, no router changes, no network restrictions.
• Stream quality (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/ULTRA) FPS cap aw bitrate control kai che network problems na shi
• Stream orientation aw resolution sta normal recording settings na akhestali shi (Video Settings → Resolution & Orientation). Che ta stream dimensions badal kol gware nu adjust ka
• Clients ba pa yao WiFi network ke de che stream ta rasai wa lag shi
Saved to device storage with Stream_ prefix
Intikhab Ka how you want to stream sta / khpal camera
Stream to devices on the same WiFi
Ko-fi ta zamong mali mard ka
Tap anywhere on the camera preview to focus

string-array.name: theme_options
string-array.item: Midnight Dusk
Faded Night
Crimson Bloom
Silent Forest
Shadow Alloy
Pookie Pink
Snow Veil

resources.string: Da minute shumaar dakhil ka. Misaluna: 5 = 5 minutes (300 seconds). Timer ba da tso minutes pas playback band kai.
Minute dakhil ka (pura shumaar). Landi calculator istemal ka che hours/minutes wuwiny.
Der loong timers ba der wakht chalu pati shi. Hadd 24 hours.
Der lag timers ba expected na pesh playback band kai shi.
Pasmanzar playback ghair faal de — timer istemal kolo dapara "Play in background" faal ka.
Default playback suraat %1$s ta tanzim sho

string-array.name: torch_error_messages
string-array.item: Torch is compiling... please don\'t wait 🖥️
Camera says: No flash today 🚦
Torch.exe not responding 🔦
Fix delayed... Developer hit a mental breakpoint lol 🧠
Patch coming soon™... Developer is debugging life 🐛

resources.string: Pa recording wakht ke torch badlolai na shi
Torch toggle os waqt mojood nadi
Kala che torch faal wi notification dari kegi
Band kawalo la para tap ka
Camera QR ya barcode pa lara nisawa
Aks ke barcode wa najda shu
Aks process kawalo ke na kaamyaab shu
Torch turns off automatically after the set time
Timer only starts when the torch is on
Torch da de camera lapara mojood nadi
Intikhab ka che Trash ke items pa khpala delete kegi.

Still on v%1$s? Nostalgic da.
Meanwhile, v%2$s is out there making waves. Time to catch up!

v%1$s is so last season.
Meanwhile, v%2$s is ready to impress with new features and bug fixes. Upgrade for a better ride!

Sta app da ter shwi wakht ke v%1$s sara de.
Meanwhile, v%2$s is the future — faster, smarter, and shinier. Why not join in?

v%1$s has served you well, but v%2$s is calling!
Enjoy the latest improvements and a smoother experience — just a tap away.
Downloads/FadCam ki yo copy jor ka (original file pati de)
Video will be saved to Downloads/FadCam
Long press "Gallery ta Sabt Ka Ka Ka ka" to choose between copy or move
Move file to Downloads/FadCam (saves storage space)
Video nezdai waht ta move sho

Playback Speed da video playback normal speed badlai. Quick Speed yao temporary boost de che sirf os wakht apply kai kala ta video bandi dab aw ogad kai. Ta da tanzimaat dalta ya Video Player screen na badal kol shaye.
Ta da intikhabuna dalta ya Settings tab na ham badal kol shaye.

string-array.name: video_resolutions_values
string-array.item: 8K
4K
2K
FHD
HD
SD
SD
SD

resources.string:
IMPORTANT NOTE:
This is an unprocessed temporary file. Video processing (like adding a watermark) may have failed or been interrupted.

Recommended Action:
1. Rename this file now (using the menu).
2. Save it to your Gallery (using the menu).

This secures your recording. After confirming it saved correctly in your gallery app, you can safely delete this temporary file from this Records list if you wish.

Continuing to record without saving may risk losing da file if the app cache is cleared unexpectedly.
All %d item(s) in trash will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
"%s" will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
Da device ke video recording dapara zaruri camera aw microphone hardware nadi.
On — Horizontal accuracy from GPS satellites
Microphone permission required for noise monitoring
Compass sensor nadi — Direction from GPS movement only (works while moving)
On — Direction from device compass sensor
Watermark disabled (no watermark will appear in recordings).
Location-dependent watermark features ba zaher na shi hatta che device location enable na shi
Location-dependent watermark features enabled de kho GPS band de. Device location faal ka che agha kar kawi.
⚠ GPS band de — da feature dapara device location enable ka
Da feature network requests gware che potentially trace keda shi. Che ta full anonymity gware nu disable ka. Jaari shi?
On — Ambient sound level from microphone
On — Suraat from GPS satellite data

UTM Earth 60 zones ke wehai aw lat/lon easting & northing meters ke badlai. Military, surveyors, aw topographic maps pa mreshta precise grid positioning dapara istemal kegi.
How to read: "Zone 42N — 372,684m E, 3,512,334m N" = Zone 42 pa Northern hemisphere ke, 372,684 meters Easting (sherq-gharb), 3,512,334 meters Northing (shamal-junub).
On — Universal Transverse Mercator grid coordinates
On — Mausam from Khola-Meteo API (requires internet)
Control kai che audio waveform visualization pa progress bar ke video playback wakht ke zaher shi ke na.
Khoso Ka how sta / khpal clock widget displays time and date
Quick actions kor screen ta pin ka che osani rasai da para.
Che prompt na zaher shi, kor screen ogad dab ka, Widgets khola, aw FadCam Clock widget drag ka.
Pinning widgets sta launcher lado support na shi.
Recording dapara zoom level adjust ka. Ultra-wide lens recordings dapara, 0.5x option istemal ka che ultra-wide field of view sara record kae.
Yawazi streaming lapara samt entekhab ka
Samt da app recording perawano entekhab ka
Da HTTP endpoints da lari sara streaming server ta rasai wala ka
API calls da lari sara FadCam remote control ka
Buffer shwi segments streaming da para tiyar shwal
⚠️ Kam Battery - Charger zar wajafa ka
Recording presets save aw load ka pa yaw sal wakht
Da FadCam Pro yo nawai version mojood sho.\n\nDa free karkono dapara, stable release ba taqriban 60 wruro ke kigi. Pro karkono updates fauren wala kige.

Da FadCam beta yao separata app de che da stable version pa neben instala kedale shi. Da ba sta stable app ya da data se nalara kai.\n\nBeta install ka da nawi khasiatono test kolo dapara che stable release ta ra sawlao.
Khpal recording sethaf kolo dapara tap ka
Stream pe zakhira kawalo pare na
Ke battery da percentage na lar aw kam shwe, khabardar darshega
Khpal device manual ya settings pukhta capacity dapara wakha. Da staso battery andaze hesab tanzimawi.
Battery malomat parse kawalo na shwe
Lotfan battery capacity mAh ke kala
